meaning: adj.绿灰色的,覆有白粉的,蓝绿色的
examples: Aggregate long ellipsoid, 13 cm long, 9 cm in diameter; pericarp with glaucous lenticels.
Exception occurred on Glaucous oak with an increase in stem mass ratio under higher light.
Plant shrubby, caudex branching, to 50 cm tall or more, 8-15 mm thick, pale green and glaucous above, darker below, leaf scars lenticular.
